offer: For property managers handling 10-20 properties/month, inefficient tracking of inspections causes compliance issues. We provide automated compliance reporting instead of manual tracking and reporting through spreadsheets.
problem: Difficulty in tracking property inspections and generating timely audit reports.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities where property managers seek advice

try_it: Let users try manual entry for 1-3 inspection items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path

Produce a short demo video of the workflow
Conduct 10 brief interviews with target users
Provide early-access onboarding for initial users
Share weekly updates in relevant online communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Allow saving common inputs as templates
Set default reminder schedules for inspections
Enable CSV import for existing inspection data
